ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the individual */,
  "quarter_of_birth" INTEGER /* Quarter of birth (1-4) indicating the quarter of the year */,
  "state_of_birth" INTEGER /* State code representing the state of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial background of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Exact date of birth of the individual */,
  "current_state" INTEGER /* Current state of residence, linking to the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_current_state FOREIGN KEY ("current_state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with this education record */,
  "years_of_schooling" INTEGER /* Number of years of schooling completed by the individual */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the individual */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the highest degree */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the highest degree was obtained */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wages" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with this wage record */,
  "log_wage" REAL /* Natural logarithm of wages earned by the individual */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual is employed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the wage was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month in which the wage was recorded */,
  "work_state" INTEGER /* State where the individual is employed, linking to the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wages_work_state FOREIGN KEY ("work_state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wages_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code representing the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Description of the quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "average_log_wage" REAL /* Average log wage calculated for a specific demographic group */,
  "total_individuals" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals included in this analysis */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the analysis is applicable */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level for the analysis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the analysis */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial background for the analysis */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background for the analysis */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title for the analysis */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_analysis_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment statistic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics recorded */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state in that year */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the statistics */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Total labor force in the state */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the state */,
  "median_wage" REAL /* Median wage in the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the job title belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES job_industries ("industry_id")
)
